title: Periodontal Disease and Poor Oral Hygiene: 9 Herbal Essential Oils for Treatment
description: Melaleuca alternifolia essential oils, also known as tea tree oil, has been shown to be beneficial in treating periodontal disease due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The main constituents of this oil, such as cineole, terpinen-4-ol, and limonene, help to combat the bacteria that cause periodontitis, a chronic infection of the gums. These compounds also reduce inflammation and prevent further damage to the gums and teeth. To use Melaleuca alternifolia essential o...
